title: Anim´s Equip
description: A new Texture Pack for your Minecraft Gameplay! This TP boosts ur FPS and also adds Aesthetic Textures to ur Armor & Tools.
body:
<details>
- <summary>READ BEFORE DOWNLOAD</summary>The Recourse Pack is not getting updated till now! If u want Updates, then install Anim´s Pack found on my Profile
</details>


<details>
- <summary>Early Access 🔒</summary>

### Early Access available on Discord ↓

[![Alt Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2334cf3eb4b13ee2695bae533f8044f6237efd83.png)](https://discord.gg/hjVXth7Cyy)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Introducing 📖</summary>

- Whole Ore Armors retextured
- Every Armor colored the same
- clean Pixels
- FPS boosting Pack
- no Graphical Bugs etc.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Features ➕</summary>

- Shorter Sword Texture
- 3D Mace (Invenotry & Hand)
- Full Ore Armors textured
- Axes & Picks got cleaner textures
- Clean pixels & less pixels
- FPS boosting Textures
- Bow & crosbow Detector

</details>

<details>
<summary>Compatibility 💻</summary>

- Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.4-1.21.8
- Also works as a pure resource pack that means no mods required


</details>

<details>
<summary>How to Install? 🧭</summary>

1. Put the zip into resourcepacks.
2. Move it to the top of the list.
3. Enjoy the Pack :>

</details>


<details>
<summary>Permissions 🔑</summary>
  
- No reuploads/reposts of the pack files.
- Only private Edits; ask for permission to redistribute.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Future Updates</summary>

- no Updates planed yet
  
</details>
